news.title: Oyo parent Prism Hotels receives Sebi nod for IPO
news.description: Prism Hotels, Oyo’s parent, received Sebi approval for a Rs 6,650 crore IPO. Targeting a $7–8 billion valuation, the firm will use funds for expansion and strengthening its balance sheet to support its ongoing push toward company profitability.

news.title: US stocks today: S&P 500, Nasdaq slides as chip stocks fall, jobs data fuels hawkish Fed fears
news.description: Markets saw a dip on Friday. Chipmaker stocks weakened after a strong rally. A better-than-expected jobs report fueled expectations of a US Federal Reserve interest rate hike. news.title: Adani Enterprises, Vodafone Idea among 6 stocks to hit 52-week high, rally up to 40% in a month
news.description: Even as the Sensex fell 117 points to close at 74,243 on Friday, six BSE 200 stocks touched fresh 52-week highs. news.title: Stable rates, steady demand: Why real estate players see RBI's pause as a confidence booster
news.description: With retail inflation easing to 3.48% in April and remaining below the RBI's 4% target, industry stakeholders see little immediate pressure on interest rates, creating a favourable backdrop for the housing market.

news.title: Dow Jones| Nasdaq | US Stock Market Today | Live: Fed’s Hammack flags possible rate hike as inflation stays high; Nasdaq slips over 1.5%
Rupee posts biggest daily gain in 2 months, closes at 94.94 vs USD as RBI ramps up currency defence
news.description: The rupee gained 0.9% to end at 94.9450 per dollar, its biggest gain since April 2. Forward premiums, ‌the cost of hedging ⁠FX ⁠exposure, plunged to 2.67 rupees, the lowest this financial year, down from 2.85 rupees.

news.title: Consumers focus on savings, selective on discretionary spending amidst geopolitical uncertainities : Report
news.description: Indian consumers prioritize savings and cautious spending amid geopolitical uncertainty, while valuing experiences and long-term financial security, report finds.
